LSE-HS10-L3-13001400-HSELA910-MTR-AAD-02 • HS English Grades 9–10 • Delineating and Evaluating Argument

The Sheriff's Own Words

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why does the girl tell the boy to change his opening?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Explain how the girl's observation about his reasoning functions as the reason for her instruction. Use academic language.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RI.9-10.8  |  HS English Grades 9–10: Delineating and Evaluating Argument
